channel.title: Stem on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Stem on jamesm.blog

item.title: Stem Separation and Source Isolation in 2026: What Actually Works
item.description: AI stem separation went from gimmick to professional tool quickly. A practical look at the state of the art in 2026 - what each tool is genuinely good at, where the artefacts still show, and how producers are actually using these in real workflows.
